mentions.note: Elliott Management took $2B+ stake with rare supportive press release. $5B buyback, 97% gross retention, 75M users. AI is a tailwind not headwind. Management endorsed.
SaaS stock out of favor alongside peers; growth deceleration as AI efficiency reduces per-user billing.
Beloved SaaS company but AI displacement poster child; 5% rally today may be short squeeze; software rallies typically met with torrential selling after couple days.
